goal: Predict bulk_modulus, density, tg for PEST (*C(C)C(=O)O*)
recovery_reason: Thermal track failed slope_gate on original plan: tg_rates_K_per_ns=[40,160,400] included r160 (125k steps < 200k floor) and r400 (50k steps contaminated). r400 gave Tg=281.1 K spurious -> slope b<0 -> slope_gate_pass=False. Registry rows discarded. Foundation (Phase A) is COMPLETE and not re-run.
assumptions: polymer_rules.json defaults are validated for this class (confidence=high, PEST)
r40 sweep is COMPLETE and reusable: Tg=428.6 K, R2=0.9942, 500k steps/T (above 200k floor)
r160 sweep COMPLETE but EXCLUDED from new ladder: 125k steps/T < 200k floor per D-06 policy
r400 sweep DISCARDED: contaminated (50k steps/T, Tg=281.1 K, drift-excluded windows)

uncertainties.name: slope_fragility
uncertainties.description: Measured Tg(r40)=428.6 K, Tg(r160)=428.8 K — only 0.2 K over 4x rate span. Expected Tg(r100)~428.7 K gives b~0.1 K/decade. Statistical noise on r100 could push Tg(r100) <= Tg(r40), yielding b<=0 and a second slope_gate failure. No budget remains for a 3rd attempt if this occurs.

evidence.claim: RadonPy/GAFF2_mod path replaced by EMC/PCFF (build-tested: PLA PASS, PET PASS). PCFF has explicit ester types (c_1, o_2, oe). Klajmon2023 benchmarks PLA/PEG with AA-MD.
PCFF uses bond-increment charges embedded in FF; no external QM charge assignment required for PEST class
Ester linkage carries C=O dipole (~0.7 D); PPPM required for all polyesters per polymer_rules.json ester-polarity note
DP=50 above Fox-Flory plateau for PLA; 10 chains provides adequate statistics for Tg/K; cell complete and confirmed (density=1.2232 g/cm3 PASS)
r40 (40 K/ns): 500k steps/T >= 200k floor; COMPLETE; Tg=428.6 K, R2=0.9942; 0h cost to reuse.
r100 (100 K/ns): steps_per_T = 20/(100*1e-6) = 200k steps = exactly at floor; estimated ~5h on GPU3 at 1.05M steps/h; fits 9.5h remaining budget leaving ~4.5h for BM.
r25 (25 K/ns, polymer_rules default): steps=800k/T, total=20.8M steps, ~20h — EXCEEDS 9.5h budget; infeasible.
r50 (50 K/ns, polymer_rules default): steps=400k/T, total=10.4M steps, ~10h — marginal; leaves <0h for BM run (~1-2h); infeasible given BM requirement.

r160 (160 K/ns): EXCLUDED. steps_per_T=125k < 200k floor per D-06 require clause. Sweep is physically clean (Tg=428.8 K, R2=0.988, no drift contamination) and consistent with r40, but policy prohibits below-floor rates in the official ladder. Noted as corroborating evidence only.
r400 (400 K/ns): DISCARDED. steps_per_T=50k (far below floor); 13/38 drift-excluded windows; spurious Tg=281.1 K; caused slope_gate failure.

SLOPE FRAGILITY NOTE: measured Tg(r40)=428.6 K, Tg(r160)=428.8 K — delta=0.2 K over 4x rate change. Expected Tg(r100)~428.6-428.8 K; slope b=(Tg_r100 - Tg_r40)/ln(100/40)~0.1 K/decade. Statistical noise on a single r100 run could produce b<=0 -> slope_gate failure with no budget for retry. This is the dominant uncertainty.

2-rate fit [40,100] is the minimum multirate fit (n_rates_min=2 per planned_stages success_criteria); slope direction confirmed by corroborating [40,160] pair (b=+0.14 K/decade) even though r160 is excluded from the official ladder.

alternatives.reason_rejected: r25 and r50 both exceed 9.5h budget; infeasible on current timeline
r50 (~10h) + r100 (~5h) = 15h total new compute; exceeds budget

alternatives.name: [40, 160] using existing r160 data
alternatives.reason_rejected: r160 excluded by D-06 floor policy (125k steps < 200k minimum); cannot be in official ladder regardless of physical cleanliness

success_criteria.note: r40 is REUSED from existing data; only r100 requires new simulation

findings: GATE: plan_mode=reasoned on PEST(confidence=high) is the SAFE direction — every decision gets full step-3 enforcement (not auto-approved). The gate only escalates the inverse (deterministic-on-non-high). Reasoned mode is justified here: the deterministic default [25,50,100] is infeasible in the 9.5h budget (r25~20h); the feasibility filter checks only the step-floor, not wall-clock, so a budget-forced deviation is exactly what reasoned mode is for.

D-09_tg_rate_ladder [40,100]: APPROVED. Floor math verified — r40=500k (clears 200k floor), r100=200k (=floor, '>=' satisfied), r160=125k (<floor, correctly excluded from official ladder). PEST tg_min_steps_per_T=200000 confirmed. [40,100] is the widest feasible span on the reused r40 anchor: cannot widen slower (no budget) nor faster (drops below floor).

D-09 slope_fragility (dominant uncertainty): proceed, do NOT escalate. Corroborating [40,160] pair gives b=+0.14 K/decade (>0), so physics expectation is b>0 though small. Escalate-now = guaranteed UNRESOLVED discarding complete foundation + complete r40; proceed-then-fail is no worse, proceed-then-succeed strictly better. No clear better option within budget.

D-06 tg_protocol require clauses satisfied: bilinear R^2 gate present (success_criteria bilinear_fit_r_squared_min=0.8, multirate loglinear>=0.9), T range 100-600K brackets exp Tg, every ladder rate clears the per-T floor.

D-07 property_method: no explicit decision entry, but BM path is policy-forced glassy-Murnaghan-300K (Tg=428.6>300 -> glassy) with deform fallback — matches require clause. murnaghan stage present with deform fallback. Not a finding (carried-over policy default, not a reasoned judgment call).

D-01_ff/D-04_system_size: alternatives:[] on evidence_required D-01. Advisory only, NOT a revise trigger — these are carried-over PEST high-confidence validated defaults (FF pcff with Klajmon2023/Afzal2021 DOI evidence; cell COMPLETE, density 1.2232 PASS). Bouncing to backfill boilerplate changes zero substance and costs a round-trip the recovery cannot afford.

Stage schema: all planned_stages have stage/track/success_criteria; tracks valid; stage->track pairings match track_map. D-08 hardware unpinned -> policy-derived (safe), no finding. reduction_probe='none' is the no-probe sentinel (both uncertainties), not a named probe -> not a finding.
